title: Tutoring Services * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Education > Tutoring Services * Hispanic/Latino Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Autism Spectrum Disorder Hispanic/Latino Community Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SOUTHERN OREGON HEAD START LISTO FAMILY LITERACY PROGRAM MEDFORD LISTO FAMILY LITERACY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Program that provides adult English as a Second Language (ESL) instruction and adult basic education for parents. Children participate in the program with their parents by attending developmentally appropriate classes and getting homework help and Spanish reading support. 1001 Beall Lane Central Point, OR 97502 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-15 Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 5:30pm-8pm (541) 734-5150 1049 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SOUTHERN OREGON HEAD START LISTO FAMILY LITERACY PROGRAM
